## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/run_ci.py`
- [ ] New positive tests
- [ ] New negative/adversarial tests
- [ ] Migration/backward-compatibility tests where relevant
- [ ] No secrets, proprietary data, caches or generated bytecode
- [ ] Technical approvals remain accurate

## Approval boundary

State explicitly which of the following remain `NOT_EVALUATED`: real experiments, commercial simulation, HAZOP/LOPA/SIL, FTO, customer qualification, pilot/demonstration and industrial performance.

## Risks and follow-up

List unresolved issues, external execution, reviewers and rollback conditions.
